name: python3-libqcow
title: python3-libqcow
summary: QEMU Copy-On-Write image format access library -- Python 3 bindings
description:
QEMU Copy-On-Write image format access library -- Python 3 bindings
libqcow is a library to access the QEMU Copy-On-Write (QCOW) image format.
.
This package contains Python 3 bindings for libqcow.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-libqcow because QEMU Copy-On-Write image format access library -- Python 3 bindings.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-libqcow as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-libqcow with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-libqcow --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
